financial_answer.brief_explanation: The term loan facility amount is $3081 and the total contractual maturities of long-term debt obligations due subsequent to December 31, 2016 are as follows: 2017 - $2014, 2018 - $150, 2019 - $175, 2020 - $2756. The percentage is calculated by dividing the term loan facility amount ($3081) by the total contractual maturities for all years (2017-2020), which equals approximately 42.8%.
